# surface

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-tab surface: renders every open tab at once positioned by its own placement (docked / floating / solo). Owns the multi-placement body, floating window chrome, geometry store, and the 3-way placement control + Esc-to-exit-solo.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Apps.Surface` "Surface" → `SurfaceBody`, `Apps.TabBarActions` "Tab bar actions" → `TabBarPlacementControl`, `ActionBar.Item` → `ActionBarPlacementControl`, `Shortcuts.Shortcut` "surface.exit-solo (Escape)"
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`, `apps.getFocusedPlacement`, `apps.Placement`, `apps.setFocusedTabPlacement`, `apps.Tab`, `apps.TabSurface`, `apps.useFocusedPlacement`, `apps.useTabs`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/shortcuts.defineShortcut`, `primitives/tab-id.getTabId`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/toggle-chip.SegmentedControl`, `primitives/ui-kit.CHROME_THEME_SCOPE`, `primitives/ui-kit.PortalThemeScopeProvider`, `shell/action-bar.ActionBar`, `ui/theme-engine.ScopedAppTheme`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
